name: agent-workforce-skills
description: Skills for multi-agent coordination - swarm patterns, workflow building, relay usage, and headless orchestration
author: khaliqgant

packages.name: choosing-swarm-patterns
packages.description: Use when coordinating multiple AI agents and need to pick the right orchestration pattern - covers 10 patterns (fan-out, pipeline, hub-spoke, consensus, mesh, handoff, cascade, dag, debate, hierarchical) with decision framework and reflection protocol

packages.name: writing-agent-relay-workflows
packages.description: Use when building multi-agent workflows with the relay broker-sdk - covers WorkflowBuilder API, DAG step dependencies, agent definitions, output chaining via {{steps.X.output}}, verification gates, evidence-based completion, channels, swarm patterns, error handling, event listeners, step sizing, lead+workers team pattern, and parallel wave planning

packages.name: using-agent-relay
packages.description: Use when coordinating multiple AI agents in real-time - provides inter-agent messaging via Relaycast MCP tools with channels, threads, reactions, search, and webhooks

packages.name: running-headless-orchestrator
packages.description: Use when an agent needs to self-bootstrap agent-relay and autonomously manage a team of workers - covers infrastructure startup, agent spawning, lifecycle monitoring, and team coordination without human intervention

packages.name: relay-80-100-workflow
packages.description: Use when writing agent-relay workflows that must fully validate features end-to-end before merging - covers the 80-to-100 pattern with PGlite in-memory Postgres testing, mock sandbox patterns, test-fix-rerun loops, verify gates, and full lifecycle from implementation through passing tests to commit

collections.name: Agent Relay Starter
collections.description: Essential skills for building multi-agent systems with Agent Relay - swarm pattern selection, workflow authoring, and trail debugging

packages.reason: Decision framework for picking the right multi-agent orchestration pattern
WorkflowBuilder API guide for authoring DAG-based multi-agent workflows
Trail snippet utility for debugging and inspecting agent execution traces
E2E validation patterns for workflows that must be production-ready before merging
